name: erp-product
description: Create ERP products from Codex using the user's Chrome ERP login.

interface.shortDescription: Precheck, upload, create, and verify ERP products.
interface.longDescription: ERP Product lets Codex use a stable runtime launcher to update and start the plugin runtime proxy, manage Product MCP, read the current Chrome ERP login through a token bridge, precheck local product packages, upload product files to OSS, query ERP references, create ERP products, and verify created product details through the local bridge/ERP backend path.
defaultPrompt: Check ERP Product MCP login status.
Create this ERP product after I confirm.
